summary: Comprehensive testing of BuraPay Telegram Mini App completed. All backend APIs (29/29 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Multi-language support (Uzbek/Russian), wallet management, deposit/withdrawal flows, and admin panel all functional.

issues: Shows 'Ruxsat yo'q' text but could have better styling/explanation

critical_code_review_comments: App.js is 1129 lines - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability
Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Test wallets and transactions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified: Home page with balance/history, Deposit with UZS/USD toggle and admin cards (Uzcard/Humo), Withdrawal with Mostbet wallets only and 8-char secret code, Wallets page with add functionality, Admin panel access control working, Multi-language (uz/ru) toggle working, Bottom navigation functional.

home_page.details: User balance displayed, transaction history shown with status indicators (pending/approved/rejected)

deposit_page.details: UZS/USD currency toggle working, admin cards (Uzcard/Humo) displayed, exchange rate calculation for USD, two-step deposit flow with copy card number

withdraw_page.details: Only Mostbet wallets shown (UZS/USD), 8-character secret code field present, withdrawal submission working

wallets_page.details: All wallet types available (Uzcard, Humo, Mostbet UZS, Mostbet USD), expiry field shows/hides based on type, wallet list displayed

admin_panel.details: Non-admin users see 'Ruxsat yo'q' message, admin APIs return correct data (stats, pending transactions, users, cards, settings)

bottom_navigation.details: All navigation links working (Asosiy, To'ldirish, Yechish, Hamyonlar)

multi_language.details: Language toggle between Uzbek and Russian working, all UI text translates correctly

api_endpoints.auth_login: PASS - Creates/returns user with correct structure
api_endpoints.admin_cards: PASS - Returns admin payment cards (Uzcard, Humo)
api_endpoints.admin_settings: PASS - Returns settings including exchange rate
api_endpoints.transactions_create: PASS - Creates deposit/withdraw requests with all fields
